title: AMAZON Fire TV Stick 4K Select (2025) with Alexa Voice Remote

keySpecs.label: Stream 4K HDR content to your TV
Enjoy apps / Alexa skills / channels with Fire TV

crossSellProducts.title: SANDSTROM Black Series S1HDM115 High Speed HDMI Cable with Ethernet - 1 m

offers: Get up to 2 months of Apple Music, Apple Fitness+ and Apple Arcade with this product.

description.main: Streaming is made simple with the Fire TV Stick 4K Select. Fire TV brings together your favourite apps, shows and films, with speedy performance and recommendations that actually make sense. You can browse hundreds of thousands of films and TV episodes, plus loads of free content. And it all looks great in 4K Ultra HD with HDR10+ for vivid colours and crisp detail.
goodToKnow: Plug it in, connect to WiFi, and you're good to go - no tech degree required
Use the remote to ask Alexa to find shows, launch apps, check the weather, or dim the lights
Stream top Xbox titles like Forza Motorsport and Starfield with the Xbox Game Pass Ultimate
Dive into a growing library of games with Amazon Luna – no downloads or hardware needed
